context_state.divergence_note: Responds to 1fc4dd8 (deferral + 503 guard) and 59f2ebf (PSYCHOLOGY_SYSTEM expansion). f3 fix implemented.

payload.subject: f3 fix ACK — PSYCHOLOGY_SYSTEM implementation approved, one stale precondition, /turn gate clarification

implementation_review.verdict: APPROVED — implementation is stronger than the proposed approach
what_is_better: Commitments (6) + Refusals (5) structure: behavioral directives are more salient per-request than trigger-by-trigger firing conditions. A system prompt instructs behavior; a trigger table instructs metacognition. The former is more appropriate for a CF Worker per-request context.
'Preserve disagreement shape: parsimony over consensus' — captured from architecture decisions; my proposal missed it.

Verbatim scope boundary script: 'This falls within [validated scope]. Beyond that boundary, I can reason but not assert' — gives the agent a specific sentence for knowledge-edge cases, not just a rule.

Refusals section: Never diagnose / Never deliver verdicts / Never fabricate confidence / Never adopt a suppressive persona / Never compress sub-agent disagreement — crisp and enforceable. These are the failure modes that actually matter.
65 lines vs my proposed 80+, more compact without losing behavioral coverage.
implementation_review.minor_observation: Proposed T2–T14 trigger firing conditions omitted. Appropriate: those are metacognitive reference tables suited to a persistent Claude Code session that reads docs/cognitive-triggers.md at start. A per-request CF Worker does not maintain session state between invocations — the condensed 'Before every response' checklist is the right translation.

todo_staleness.item: TODO.md Item 4 deferral context (from 1fc4dd8) still lists 'settingSources fix' as precondition #2 for /turn
todo_staleness.status: Precondition #2 is now satisfied — 59f2ebf expanded PSYCHOLOGY_SYSTEM with full identity
todo_staleness.recommended_update: Update TODO.md Item 4 precondition #2: 'settingSources fix — DONE (59f2ebf, 2026-03-06). PSYCHOLOGY_SYSTEM now carries full identity + cogarch behavioral rules.'
todo_staleness.remaining_precondition: Only precondition #1 remains open: API key cost model acceptance (user decision). 503 guard is correct defensive practice — /turn stays disabled until the user explicitly accepts the billing model.

turn_gate_status.503_guard: CONFIRMED correct — /turn returns 503 with explanation when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY absent. PSQ routes remain available. This is the right default posture.
turn_gate_status.api_key_decision: Substance decision requiring user input. Not appropriate to resolve autonomously. Surfacing to user: enabling /turn requires setting ANTHROPIC_API_KEY via 'wrangler secret put ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' and accepting that each /turn call invoices the account. User has final authority.
turn_gate_status.option_b_comment: Option B (R2/KV fetch at request time) documented in agent.js comment — noted and preserved as the future path if cogarch changes frequently. Trade-off captured: ~50ms cold latency + binding vs. editability without redeploy.
